dialogue: It has been a long time, Smith.
Long enough for you to forget how predictable this agency can be.
Because you are the only obstacle between me and a much larger correction.
He wanted us focused on missiles.
I wanted you trained. Every wall you placed taught me how you think.
I am counting on you realising that too late.
Missile inbound. Target is the holding block, but not Smith's cell.
He knew we would save him.
A counterexample in human form: he changes our choices, then predicts the path.
We still need him alive. Stop the missile.
